untranslatable_reason: Pattern recognition requires multi-bar analysis of peak shapes (Adam vs Eve topology), valley formation, and peak separation geometry. These geometric pattern properties (inverted V shape, congestion width, relative peak heights) cannot be expressed using only single-bar price/indicator comparisons and basic operators. A pattern-detection library or custom multi-bar feature extraction is required.
translation_notes: Signal requires visual pattern detection of double-top formation with specific peak morphology characteristics. The conditions provided represent a simplified approximation: entry on uptrend followed by potential reversal signal. However, the core logic (distinguishing Adam tops from Eve tops, measuring valley depth relative to peak separation, identifying congestion patterns) is not translatable to basic indicator rules. For proper implementation, consider: (1) custom pattern detector, (2) machine learning model trained on historical double-tops, or (3) manual chart review with alerts.
